title: Mounts Is Bugs
description: Removes the mid-air mining speed penalty while on a mount
body:
This mod removes the mining speed debuff as long as you are riding something.

By default, Minecraft applies a 5x mining speed debuff while the player is in the air. For some reason, this also applies to mounts, even if they are on the ground, so this mod adds some additional logic to fix this small inconsistency.

Needs to be installed on the client and server. If it's only on the client, servers without the mod may detect this mod as cheating.
